title: blepharis subglabra
intro: Blepharis subglabra, also known as desert blepharis, is a species of plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to Africa. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Blepharis subglabra include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. Blepharis subglabra can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
